$code..write:
auth != null && newData.exists() && (
          !data.exists() ||
          (
            (now - data.child('updatedAt').val()) < 86400000 &&
            (
              data.child('status').val() === 'waiting' ||
              data.child('players/X/uid').val() === auth.uid ||
              data.child('players/O/uid').val() === auth.uid
            )
          )
        )

$idx..validate:
data.val() === newData.val() ||
                ((!data.exists() || data.val() === '') && newData.val() === '') ||
                (
                  newData.val() === '' &&
                  (data.val() === 'X' || data.val() === 'O') &&
                  root.child('rooms').child($code).child('game/over').val() === true
                ) ||
                (
                  (newData.val() === 'X' || newData.val() === 'O') &&
                  (!data.exists() || data.val() === '') &&
                  newData.val() === root.child('rooms').child($code).child('game/current').val() &&
                  auth.uid === root.child('rooms').child($code).child('players').child(
                    root.child('rooms').child($code).child('game/current').val()
                  ).child('uid').val()
                )
